title: Snorland Cobblemon
description: The modpack to play on The Snorland Cobblemon SMP!
body:
# 🔴Welcome to **Snorland** Cobblemon [1.7.3]🔴
**The Ultimate RPG-Driven Pokémon Experience**

_Are you tired of "pay-to-win" servers that lock the best features behind a massive paywall? Are you looking for a Cobblemon experience that actually feels like a living, breathing RPG world?_

_Welcome to Snorland. We’ve built a community-focused environment where your progress is defined by your skill, not your wallet. Running on the latest Cobblemon 1.7.3, we’ve integrated deep RPG mechanics with the classic monster-collecting gameplay you love._

🌟 **What Makes Us Different?**
🚫 Strictly **NO Pay-to-Win**: We believe in a level playing field. Everything impactful is earned through gameplay, quests, and dedication.

⚔️ **RPG Skills** & Leveling: Enhance your trainer! Level up specific RPG skills to unlock unique perks and abilities as you explore the world.

🐲 **Raids & Alphas**: Think you’re the best? Test your team against massive Alpha Pokémon and cooperative Raids that require strategy and teamwork.

💥 **Mega Evolutions**: Harness the power of Mega Evolution to dominate the battlefield and push your Pokémon to their absolute limit.

🏆 **The Gym Circuit**: Challenge our official NPC Gyms, or prove your worth against Player-Run Gyms for a more dynamic, competitive experience.

📦 **Crates & Rewards**: Earn keys through voting and events to unlock rare items, cosmetics, and resources.
